message:
🌱 Exempt arcade cards from demo badge and yellow border (#309)

Game cards (sudoku, checkers, tetris, kube-kong, pod-crosser,
kube-kart, kube-snake, kube-chess) don't have "demo data" — they're
always just games. Added DEMO_EXEMPT_CARDS set and excluded them
from demo indicators in CardWrapper.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -378,6 +378,21 @@ export const DEMO_DATA_CARDS = new Set([
   'provider_health',
 ])
 
+/**
+ * Cards that should never show demo indicators (badge/yellow border).
+ * Arcade/game cards don't have "demo data" — they're always just games.
+ */
+export const DEMO_EXEMPT_CARDS = new Set([
+  'sudoku_game',
+  'checkers',
+  'container_tetris',
+  'kube_kong',
+  'pod_crosser',
+  'kube_kart',
+  'kube_snake',
+  'kube_chess',
+])
+
 /**
  * Cards that display live/real-time data streams.
  * These show a "Live" badge in the title when showing real data (not demo).
